entries.source: "Explain derivatives step by step"
entries.value: "derivatives टप्प्याटप्प्याने समजावून सांगा"

entries.source: "Help with quadratic equations"
entries.value: "quadratic equations मध्ये मदत"

entries.source: "Solve 2x + 5 = 17 with me"
entries.value: "माझ्यासोबत 2x + 5 = 17 सोडवा"

entries.source: A practical guide to using Math Step Coach on inspir for stem learning, with prompts, study loops, and safer AI habits.
entries.value: STEM learning साठी inspir वर Math Step Coach वापरण्याचा practical guide, prompts, study loops आणि सुरक्षित AI habits सह.

entries.source: A stronger study loop
entries.value: अधिक मजबूत study loop

entries.source: AI tutor
entries.value: AI शिक्षक

entries.source: Ask for a small first step rather than a final answer.
entries.value: final answer ऐवजी छोटी पहिली पायरी मागा.

entries.source: Ask the AI to check your reasoning, not just the result.
entries.value: AI ला फक्त result नव्हे, तुमचे reasoning check करायला सांगा.

entries.source: Check each step.
entries.value: प्रत्येक step तपासा.

entries.source: Choose a first move.
entries.value: पहिली move निवडा.

entries.source: Explain why the method works.
entries.value: method का काम करते ते explain करा.

entries.source: Finish by writing the idea back from memory.
entries.value: memory मधून idea परत लिहून finish करा.

entries.source: Learners who want to see why each math step works, not just copy an answer.
entries.value: जे विद्यार्थी केवळ उत्तर कॉपी न करता गणिताची प्रत्येक पायरी कशी काम करते हे पाहू इच्छितात.

entries.source: Math Step Coach
entries.value: मॅथ स्टेप कोच

entries.source: Math Step Coach For Solving Problems With Understanding is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Solve math by understanding each step. Your coach checks your work, points out slips, and builds confidence.
entries.value: Math Step Coach For Solving Problems With Understanding हा passive answer collection ऐवजी learning साठी AI वापरण्याचा focused मार्ग आहे. हा mode एका specific job भोवती तयार आहे: प्रत्येक step समजून math solve करा. तुमचा coach तुमचे work check करतो, slips दाखवतो आणि confidence build करतो.

entries.source: Math Step Coach For Understanding: practical guide
entries.value: math Step प्रशिक्षक साठी Understanding: practical मार्गदर्शक

entries.source: Prompts to try
entries.value: Try करण्यासाठी prompts

entries.source: Start the live mode at Math Step Coach. If you want a neighboring learning format, try Science Lab Partner. For a broader view of the platform, read what an AI learning companion should do for everyone.
entries.value: Math Step Coach वर live mode सुरू करा. neighboring learning format हवा असल्यास Science Lab Partner try करा. platform च्या broader view साठी AI learning companion सर्वांसाठी काय करायला हवा ते वाचा.

entries.source: Tell the mode what you are trying to learn or produce.
entries.value: तुम्ही काय learn किंवा produce करण्याचा प्रयत्न करत आहात ते mode ला सांगा.

entries.source: That difference shows up in the flow. Instead of one giant response, the best sessions move through a loop: set a goal, try something, get feedback, repair the weak spot, and choose the next action.
entries.value: तो difference flow मध्ये दिसतो. one giant response ऐवजी best sessions loop मधून जातात: goal set करा, काहीतरी try करा, feedback मिळवा, weak spot repair करा आणि next action choose करा.

entries.source: That focus matters. A general chatbot can answer almost anything, but a learning mode gives the conversation a shape. It nudges you toward the kind of thinking, practice, feedback, or exploration that helps the idea stick.
entries.value: तो focus महत्त्वाचा आहे. general chatbot जवळजवळ काहीही answer करू शकतो, पण learning mode conversation ला shape देतो. idea stick व्हायला मदत करणाऱ्या thinking, practice, feedback किंवा exploration कडे तो nudge करतो.

entries.source: The flow checks each step, points out slips, and connects procedures back to the concept.
entries.value: ही पद्धत प्रत्येक पायरी तपासते, चुका निदर्शनास आणते आणि प्रक्रिया संकल्पनेशी जोडते.

entries.source: This is the same habit behind studying with AI without cheating yourself: keep the learner active. AI is most useful when it gives you feedback on your thinking.
entries.value: AI सोबत स्वतःला न फसवता study करण्यामागचीही हीच सवय आहे: learner active ठेवा. AI तुमच्या thinking वर feedback देते तेव्हा ते सर्वात उपयोगी ठरते.

entries.source: This mode is especially useful for learners who want to:
entries.value: हा mode विशेषतः त्या learners साठी उपयोगी आहे जे करू इच्छितात:

entries.source: Try the step in your own words.
entries.value: step तुमच्या स्वतःच्या शब्दांत try करा.

entries.source: Use Math Step Coach when you want a session that starts quickly but still adapts to you. The first goal is not to sound impressive. The first goal is to make the next step feel possible.
entries.value: Math Step Coach वापरा जेव्हा तुम्हाला session पटकन सुरू व्हावे पण तरीही ते तुमच्यानुसार adapt व्हावे असे वाटते. पहिले ध्येय प्रभावी वाटणे नाही. पहिले ध्येय पुढचा step शक्य वाटायला लावणे आहे.

entries.source: What this mode helps with
entries.value: हा mode कशात मदत करतो

entries.source: Where to go next
entries.value: पुढे कुठे जायचे

entries.source: You can also start with a rough version of your real problem. A messy first prompt is fine. The session can clarify the level, audience, deadline, and style once you begin.
entries.value: तुमच्या real problem च्या rough version नेही तुम्ही सुरू करू शकता. messy first prompt ठीक आहे. तुम्ही सुरू केल्यावर session level, audience, deadline आणि style स्पष्ट करू शकते.
